requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Eritrea Project and Lender Review
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——厄立特里亚项目和贷款方审查
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——厄利垂亞項目和貸款方審查

summary.en: A public Eritrea solar-inverter product-safety regulation or strong national standards-body route could not be confirmed. For bankable PV projects, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the most defensible safety evidence for PV power converters and inverters, especially where EEC, ministries, EPC contractors, mining customers, donors, or lenders specify IEC certificates. Safety evidence should cover the exact model or certified family, DC isolation, protective earthing, thermal protection, enclosure ingress protection, installation altitude, ambient temperature range, and operation under Horn of Africa heat and dust exposure.
summary.zh: 未能确认厄立特里亚公开的太阳能逆变器产品安全法规或强国家标准机构路径。对于可融资光伏项目，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏功率变换器和逆变器最可辩护的安全证据，尤其适用于EEC、主管部委、EPC承包商、矿业客户、捐助方或贷款方指定IEC证书的情况。安全证据应覆盖具体型号或认证系列、直流隔离、保护接地、热保护、外壳防护等级、安装海拔、环境温度范围以及非洲之角高温和沙尘暴露下运行。
summary.zht: 未能確認厄利垂亞公開的太陽能逆變器產品安全法規或強國家標準機構路徑。對於可融資光伏項目，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏功率轉換器和逆變器最可辯護的安全證據，尤其適用於EEC、主管部委、EPC承包商、礦業客戶、捐助方或貸款方指定IEC證書的情況。安全證據應覆蓋具體型號或認證系列、直流隔離、保護接地、熱保護、外殼防護等級、安裝海拔、環境溫度範圍以及非洲之角高溫和沙塵暴露下運行。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
EEC / ministry / project-owner technical documentation requirements where applicable
Donor, lender, EPC, or mining-customer IEC safety requirements where applicable

summary.en: China-side PV inverter safety files commonly reference GB/T 37408-2021 and domestic CQC, CGC, or laboratory reports. These documents may demonstrate useful design and production controls, but they are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates for Eritrea projects. Where Chinese reports are not issued against IEC 62109 by an internationally recognised laboratory, they should be treated as supporting evidence only.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器安全文件通常引用GB/T 37408-2021以及国内CQC、CGC或实验室报告。这些文件可证明有用的设计和生产控制，但不会自动等同于厄立特里亚项目的IEC 62109-1/-2证书。若中国报告并非由国际认可实验室按IEC 62109出具，应仅作为支持性证据处理。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器安全文件通常引用GB/T 37408-2021以及國內CQC、CGC或實驗室報告。這些文件可證明有用的設計和生產控制，但不會自動等同於厄利垂亞項目的IEC 62109-1/-2證書。若中國報告並非由國際認可實驗室按IEC 62109出具，應僅作為支持性證據處理。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary PV inverter certification schemes where used by the manufacturer

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T safety evidence does not remove the need for IEC 62109-1/-2 model coverage where Eritrea project owners, EEC, ministries, donors, or lenders request IEC evidence. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates and reports, CB Test Certificate or ILAC-accredited laboratory evidence where available, model-family mapping, bill-of-materials change control, English installation and warning documentation, and heat/dust derating curves for operation in hot outdoor enclosures.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T安全证据不能消除厄立特里亚项目业主、EEC、主管部委、捐助方或贷款方要求IEC证据时对IEC 62109-1/-2型号覆盖的需要。出口商应提供IEC 62109-1/-2证书和报告、可用时的CB测试证书或ILAC认可实验室证据、型号系列映射、物料清单变更控制、英文安装和警示文件，以及在炎热户外外壳中运行的高温/沙尘降额曲线。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T安全證據不能消除厄利垂亞項目業主、EEC、主管部委、捐助方或貸款方要求IEC證據時對IEC 62109-1/-2型號覆蓋的需要。出口商應提供IEC 62109-1/-2證書和報告、可用時的CB測試證書或ILAC認可實驗室證據、型號系列映射、物料清單變更控制、英文安裝和警示文件，以及在炎熱戶外外殼中運行的高溫/沙塵降額曲線。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but mandatory in practice where EEC, ministries, project owners, EPC contractors, donors, or lenders require IEC inverter safety evidence; otherwise still a practical baseline for bankable PV procurement
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 and domestic voluntary certification are China-side evidence; not automatically equivalent to IEC 62109 acceptance in Eritrea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Provide IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence for the exact inverter model or certified family before Eritrea project submission. China GB/T 37408 safety files can support the dossier but should not be presented as a substitute for IEC 62109 where EEC, ministries, project owners, EPC contractors, donors, or lenders request IEC evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在提交厄立特里亚项目文件前，应为具体逆变器型号或认证系列提供IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据。中国GB/T 37408安全文件可支持资料包，但在EEC、主管部委、项目业主、EPC承包商、捐助方或贷款方要求IEC证据时，不应作为IEC 62109的替代品提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在提交厄利垂亞項目文件前，應為具體逆變器型號或認證系列提供IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據。中國GB/T 37408安全文件可支持資料包，但在EEC、主管部委、項目業主、EPC承包商、捐助方或貸款方要求IEC證據時，不應作為IEC 62109的替代品提交。
